title: crataegus brevispina var. microphylla
intro: Crataegus brevispina var. microphylla, also known as the small-leaved hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree species within the Crataegus genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic effects. The small-leaved hawthorn has been found to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of heart disease. In herbal preparations, the small-leaved hawthorn is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
